song.title: Rejoice The Lord is King
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Rejoice, the Lord is King! Your Lord and King adore! Mortals, give thanks and sing, And triumph evermore: Lift up your heart, lift up your voice! Rejoice, again I say, rejoice!
[V2] 2) His kingdom cannot fail, He rules o’er earth and heav’n; The keys of death and hell Are to our Jesus giv’n: Lift up your heart, lift up your voice! Rejoice, again I say, rejoice!
[V3] 3) Jesus, the Savior, reigns, The God of truth and heav'n; The keys of death and hell Are to our seat above: Lif up your heart, lift up your voice! Rejoice, again I say, rejoice!
[V4] 4) He sits at God’s right hand Till all His foes submit, And bow to His command, And fall beneath His feet: Lift up your heart, lift up your voice! Rejoice, again I say, rejoice!
song.author: Charles Wesley
